Class MockUserService

java.lang.Object
at.jku.se.smarthome.service.api.UserService
at.jku.se.smarthome.service.mock.MockUserService
public class MockUserService extends UserService
Mock User Service providing user management functionality.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static MockUserService getInstance()

    • resetForTesting

      public static void resetForTesting()
      Resets the singleton for unit testing. Must NOT be called from production code.

    • register

      public boolean register(String email, String username, String password, String confirmPassword)
      Registers a new user.
      Overrides:
      register in class UserService
      Parameters:
      email - email address for the new user
      username - display name or login name
      password - raw password value
      confirmPassword - repeated password value
      Returns:
      true when registration succeeds, otherwise false

    • registerUser

      public UserService.RegistrationStatus registerUser(String email, String username, String password, String confirmPassword)
      Registers a new user and returns a status for UI feedback.
      Specified by:
      registerUser in class UserService
      Parameters:
      email - email address for the new user
      username - display name or login name
      password - raw password value
      confirmPassword - repeated password value
      Returns:
      registration outcome status

      password - raw password value
      Returns:
      true when authentication succeeds, otherwise false

      Gets the current user's email.

      public long getRemainingThrottleSeconds(String email)
      Returns the remaining login throttle duration for the supplied email.
      Specified by:
      getRemainingThrottleSeconds in class UserService
      Parameters:
      email - email address to inspect
      Returns:
      remaining throttle time in seconds, or zero when not throttled

      Invites a member.
      Specified by:

      Returns:

      Restores access for a previously revoked or pending member.

      Returns:
